preview.title: Start with a wallet you can operate
preview.content: Preview the money surface before creating the password: self-custody, Lightning, on-chain deposits, reusable identity and node control are all part of the same workspace.
preview.empty_state: Fund after backup, then receive or send from the dashboard.

welcome.title: One wallet surface, many payment rails
welcome.content: SwissKnife treats Lightning invoices, on-chain requests and human-readable addresses as one money workflow instead of separate admin screens.
welcome.point_one: Receive with Lightning, a fresh Bitcoin address or a reusable Lightning Address.
welcome.point_two: Send from a single input that can grow into LNURL, BIP21 and address parsing.
welcome.point_three: Keep the interface focused on amounts, status and next action.

custody.title: Self-custody stays visible
custody.content: The dashboard should make it clear what the password unlocks, what must be backed up and why the server cannot recover private material for you.
custody.point_one: Create a local password before the wallet opens.
custody.point_two: Back up node and wallet recovery material before meaningful deposits.
custody.point_three: Show security reminders at the moment they matter.

accessibility.title: Bring your own node, or host it cleanly
accessibility.content: Umbrel is one good self-hosted target, but the experience should also make sense for Start9, raw LND, CLN and managed cloud deployments.
accessibility.point_one: Treat self-hosted as a deployment model, not a separate wallet mode.
accessibility.point_two: Keep node health, liquidity and peer state close to payment actions.
accessibility.point_three: Use regtest-friendly flows so first deposits can be tested safely.

multi_user.title: Accounts without spreadsheet ops
multi_user.content: Accounts, wallets and reusable identities should feel like a small operating system for teams, agents and services.
multi_user.point_one: Separate the accounts directory from wallet administration.
multi_user.point_two: Make Lightning Address ownership visible without exposing raw UUIDs.
multi_user.point_three: Prepare the UI for roles, agents, API keys and service wallets.
